share.addPagePlaceholder: Save the Provider first, then reopen the editor to configure remote sharing.
share.invalidConfiguration: Fix the remote share configuration before saving
share.sectionHint: Each Provider maps to one Share. Configure sharing here; use Router Console for advanced operations.
share.disabledHint: Enable this to configure remote sharing and create a Share.
share.ownerRequired: Configure the Client Tunnel Owner email on the Share settings page first

gemini.antigravityOauthHint: Antigravity OAuth uses a managed Antigravity account and does not require an API Key.

share.unsupportedApp: {{app}} does not support sharing. Switch to the Claude, Codex, or Gemini tab to create a Share.

userLimit.title: User limits
userLimit.hint: The overall Share limits always apply; each user is also constrained by their own limits.

share.boundProviderHint: Requests for this app always use the bound Provider and do not participate in failover.
share.manageInProviderHint: Open the bound Provider editor to change sharing settings.
share.emptyReadOnlyHint: Shares are created and managed in the Remote Share section of the Provider editor.
share.readOnlyOverviewHint: This is a read-only overview. Open the bound Provider editor to change sharing settings.

routerOwner.signedInOwner: Signed in as owner {{email}}; configuration is editable
routerOwner.signedInReadOnly: Signed in as {{email}}; only owner {{owner}} can edit configuration
routerOwner.signInPrompt: Sign in with the Share owner email to edit configuration

codexConfig.noCommonConfigToApply: The common configuration is empty or has no writable values

route.stopBlockedByTakeover: Another app is using proxy takeover. Disable its takeover in Settings before stopping the local route.

settings.loadFailed: Unable to load settings. Refresh the page and try again.

authCenter.serverDescription: Manage official OAuth accounts used by the upstream proxy. Usage refresh applies only to the active Provider.
authCenter.kiroOauthDescription: Manage Kiro AWS Builder ID accounts

serverConfigDir.title: Server configuration directory
serverConfigDir.description: Directory containing providers, shares, UI settings, and other persistent files. The listen address and port come from process arguments.

clientTunnel.conflict: Subdomain conflict; not registered with Router
clientTunnel.unclaimed: Configured but not registered with Router
